character.definition: (same as 咢) to beat a drum; to startle, to argue; to debate; to dispute, (interchangeable 愕) to be surprised; to be amazed; to marvel, (interchangeable 鍔) the blade or edge of a sword, beams of a house
(an ancient form) (same as 𣡌) leaves sprouting from the stump of a tree; shoots from an old stump, a large (a species of oak) from the bark of which a yellow dye is produced
(same as 菢) to incubate; to brood; to hatch; to sit on a nest, a woolen blanket
buzzing in the ears; tinnitus aurium
(same as 蒯) Scirpus cyperinus var, concolor, a rush, from which many things are woven
comb; comb out; weed out, eliminate
